field_values.action_summary: After seven days, the community prepares to march toward Thark. Lorquas Ptomel rewards Carter with a gold anklet in recognition of his success with the mounts.
field_values.emotional_beat: From industrious preparation to ceremonial honor.
field_values.camera_intent: Group shots of the marching horde; Medium close-up of gold anklet presentation; Reaction shots from warriors
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Presence and placement of the gold anklet on john_carter
Readiness level/equipment state of the Green Martian Horde troops
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH013_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the transition from a period of intense community preparation to a formal ceremonial event. The scene must visually communicate the scale of the Green Martian Horde's readiness for the march while centering on the intimate, symbolic reward given to John Carter by Lorquas Ptomel.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- lorquas_ptomel
- Green Martian Horde

## Required Environments
- green_martian_city_complex (Assembly Plaza)

## Continuity Constraints
- Presence and placement of the gold anklet on john_carter
- Readiness level/equipment state of the Green Martian Horde troops

## Beat List
- BT001: Industrious preparation of the horde
- BT002: Ceremonial reward for Carter
- BT003: Communal recognition
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
